title: WorldAcceleratorFix
description: A forge mod that fixes GregTech's World Accelerator stop working issue.
body:
This mod is a GregTech Modern addon which fixes [#3181](https://github.com/GregTechCEu/GregTech-Modern/issues/3181) which causes the world accelerator machine stop working when it was reloaded (such as rejoin the game, or just reload the chunk).

The issue has already fixed in GregTech Modern 1.20.1-7.2.0 SNAPSHOT 69c9a2a, you **SHOULD NOT** use the mod in future version.
